---
title: "**Sandy's GPT**"
subtitle: "**GYAAN** (unsolicited),  **PUNDITRY** (inevitable), **THEORIES** (under construction)"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
---

Welcome to my sandbox! 

This is my little corner of the internet where I learn, experiment, and occasionally commit acts of code against my own will.




Think of this blog as a public lab notebook: a place to think out loud, share reproducible code, learn new methods, and occasionally stumble into something interesting enough to pretend it was planned all along.
